name: Resizable
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Resizable split-panel primitive with local size normalization, keyboard resizing, pointer-drag messages, shadcn slots, and origin example coverage.

registry.reason: shadcn Resizable uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, message, and runtime command types for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Schema, Match, Array, and Option modules for state and update helpers.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin runtime behavior is replaced by local Foldkit state, messages, and pure resize helpers.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local static RTL labels.

examples.title: ResizableDemo
examples.description: Nested horizontal and vertical Resizable layout.
examples.distinguishes: Nested horizontal and vertical Resizable layout.

examples.title: ResizableHandleDemo
examples.description: Two-panel Resizable layout with visible handle affordance.
examples.distinguishes: Two-panel Resizable layout with visible handle affordance.

examples.title: ResizableRtl
examples.description: RTL nested Resizable layout with local static direction data.
examples.distinguishes: RTL nested Resizable layout with local static direction data.

deviations.summary: Resizable replaces react-resizable-panels with local Foldkit state, message, keyboard, and pointer-delta helpers.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source cannot depend on React panel runtime behavior; local state preserves the public split-panel semantics and shadcn markup slots.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local static labels instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Static RTL direction preserves the rendered layout needed by parity fixtures.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Resizable split-panel primitive with local size normalization, keyboard resizing, pointer-drag messages, shadcn slots, and origin example coverage.
